title: View activity log across entire workspace
excerpt: Is there a way for a workspace owner to check the activity log for the entire workspace, instead of having to check each board in the workspace?

posts.author: simone.steffen (Simone Steffen)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way for a workspace owner to check the activity log for the entire workspace, instead of having to check each board in the workspace?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Simone! We currently do not offer a feature that would provide a high-level activity log view of a workspace.

That said, our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here
